articles.summary: Anthropic has recently received multiple investment offers from venture capitalists that value the company at up to $800 billion. This proposed figure would more than double the current valuation of the startup behind the Claude AI model.

articles.title: Microsoft’s finally giving up on its massive Surface Hub touchscreen displays - The Verge

articles.title: ‘Heartbreaking reality’: Hampshire College announces transition to closure - The Boston Globe
articles.summary: Hampshire College has announced its transition to closure, marking the end of a tumultuous chapter for the liberal arts school. President Jennifer Chrisler stated that the decision follows a herculean effort to maintain operations despite increasingly complex financial pressures. These financial challenges were further compounded by shifting external factors.
articles.description: The announcement marks the end of another tumultuous chapter in the ongoing saga of the liberal arts school.

articles.title: U.S. blockade has turned back six merchant ships leaving Strait of Hormuz - The Washington Post
articles.summary: More than a dozen U.S. warships positioned in the Gulf of Oman and Arabian Sea have turned back six merchant vessels departing an Iranian port. Officials stated the warships are acting as a “net” to counter Tehran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz. None of the encounters during the Trump administration's bid required escalation.
articles.description: More than a dozen American warships positioned in the Gulf of Oman and Arabian Sea are acting as a “net,” officials said. None of the encounters has required escalation.
articles.author: Tara Copp
